title: gilia schottii
intro: Gilia schottii, also known as Schott's gilia, is a flowering plant species in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gilia schottii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
